Absolution.name: Absolution
Absolution.description: Taunt all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds and increase your movement speed by 50% for 4 seconds.

Aggramar's Rage.name: Aggramar's Rage
Aggramar's Rage.description: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 3% and your expertise by 5.

Argent Blade.name: Argent Blade
Argent Blade.description: Crush an enemy with argent fervor, dealing 160% Weapon Damage plus 43, healing you equal to the damage dealt, and extending the duration of your |cffffffffOath Chain|r by 3 sec.

Argent Knight.name: Argent Knight
Argent Knight.description:
Increases the damage dealt by Righteous Tempest and Condemn by 30%.

Additionally, Righteous Tempest now reduces all damage taken by -20% while active.

Armor of Faith.name: Armor of Faith
Armor of Faith.description: Whenever the absorption shield from Staffguard breaks, inflict 207 + 20% AP + 50% holy SP High Threat Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Barrier of Light.name: Barrier of Light
Barrier of Light.description:
Emit saving light, increasing the healing received by nearby allies by 40% for 15 seconds.

For the duration, threat generated by your allies is redirected to you.

Battle Hardened.name: Battle Hardened
Battle Hardened.description: Reduces the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -5 sec.

Battlepriest.name: Battlepriest
Battlepriest.description: While above 80% health or below 20% health, you now take 20% reduced Magic damage.

Beckon.name: Beckon
Beckon.description: Taunt an enemy to attack you for 3 sec.

Bells of Light.name: Bells of Light
Bells of Light.description: Increases your Agility, Intellect, and hit chance by 3%

Benediction.name: Benediction
Benediction.description:
Unleash a healing |cffffffffOath Breaker|r, restoring 12 health to an ally, scaling with Stamina.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional healing for each consumed.

Binding Scripture.name: Binding Scripture
Binding Scripture.description: Healing an ally now redirects 10% of their damage taken to you and reduces your damage taken by -5% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Blade Sermon.name: Blade Sermon
Blade Sermon.description: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Zealotry by 10%.

Blade of Faith.name: Blade of Faith
Blade of Faith.description:
Unleash a devastating |cffffffffOath Breaker|r on an enemy dealing 191 Holy damage over 21 sec. This ability can critically strike.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Blessed Padding.name: Blessed Padding
Blessed Padding.description: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 50% and reduces damage taken from area of effect attacks by -10%.

Blessed Strikes.name: Blessed Strikes
Blessed Strikes.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Oath Breakers by -10.

Blessing of Aggramar.name: Blessing of Aggramar
Blessing of Aggramar.description: Righteous Lunge now has a 25% chance to generate an additional stack of Oath: Righteous Lunge.

Blessing of Eonar.name: Blessing of Eonar
Blessing of Eonar.description: Using Libram spells now increases your damage dealt and healing done by 10% for 15 seconds.

Bursting Impact.name: Bursting Impact
Bursting Impact.description: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.

Call of the Monastery.name: Call of the Monastery
Call of the Monastery.description:
Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your attack power by 5%.

Calm Combatant.name: Calm Combatant
Calm Combatant.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Holy spell damage by 30% of your attack power.

Chakra of Light.name: Chakra of Light
Chakra of Light.description: Reduces the cooldown of Testaments by -30 sec and Oath Breakers now heal allies around the target for 20 + 35% SP.

Chakra of Power.name: Chakra of Power
Chakra of Power.description: Melee attacks now restore 1 Energy, plus an additional 2 Energy when they critically strike.

Chastise.name: Chastise
Chastise.description:
Unleash an |cffffffffOath Breaker|r, blasting an enemy for 21 Holy damage.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Chivalric.name: Chivalric
Chivalric.description: Increases your critical damage with Holy spells and abilities by 15%.

Combat Training.name: Combat Training
Combat Training.description: Increases the effectiveness of Oaths by 20%.

Condemn.name: Condemn
Condemn.description:
Condemn an enemy, dealing 58 Holy damage over 15 sec, stacking 3 times and granting an |cffffffffOath|r.

|cffffffffOath:|r Increases your critical strike chance by 5%.

Condemnation.name: Condemnation
Condemnation.description: Increases the critical strike chance gained through Condemn by 3%.

Conviction.name: Conviction
Conviction.description: Casting Sacred Swing now increases your melee haste by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Courage.name: Courage
Courage.description: Increases your movement speed and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -10%.

Crusader's Brand.name: Crusader's Brand
Crusader's Brand.description:
Brand an enemy for 20 seconds, preventing them from mounting, fleeing, or increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed and when they deal direct damage they take 243 + 27.5% holy SP + 18.5% AP Holy Damage.

While marked enemies can always be seen by the Crusader even while stealthed or invisible.

Crusader's Presence.name: Crusader's Presence
Crusader's Presence.description:
Increases mounted movement speed by 50% for all party and raid members within 40 yds for 15 sec.

Can only be used while Mounted. Does not stack with similar effects.

Deep Meditation.name: Deep Meditation
Deep Meditation.description: Increases the duration of your Oath Chain by 5 sec.

Deep Secrets.name: Deep Secrets
Deep Secrets.description: Increases the duration of your Librams and Testaments by 10 sec.

Deliverance.name: Deliverance
Deliverance.description: Critically striking with Vindication or Righteous Lunge now deals 50% additional Physical damage.

Detect Evil.name: Detect Evil
Detect Evil.description: Shows the location of all nearby Undead and Demons on the minimap.

Determined.name: Determined
Determined.description: Your Temple Guardian now makes your next ability within 5 seconds free of cost.

Devotion of Khaz'goroth.name: Devotion of Khaz'goroth
Devotion of Khaz'goroth.description:
Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

Damage dealt with auto attacks reduce the cooldown of Libram spells by -0.5 sec.

Disciplined Blows.name: Disciplined Blows
Disciplined Blows.description:
Your healing done triggers a holy pulse around healed targets, dealing 89 + 5% AP + 20% Agility Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Cnly occur once every 0.5 sec.

Disciplined Mind.name: Disciplined Mind
Disciplined Mind.description: Increases the healing of Benediction by 15% and causes it to dispel 1 poison and disease effect.

Divine Charge.name: Divine Charge
Divine Charge.description:
You and your party members leap upon a divine steed, increasing their movement speed by 100% and causing them to trample nearby enemies for 119 + 20% AP + 40% holy SP Holy Damage every 1 sec for 15 seconds.

While active, casting does not dismount you or your allies. Can only be used outdoors.

Divine Force.name: Divine Force
Divine Force.description: Leap at an enemy with divine force, stunning them for 6 sec, dealing 47 Holy damage, and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 3 sec.

Divine Stand.name: Divine Stand
Divine Stand.description: Take a stand against evil, increasing your threat generated by 75% and an additional 150% from Holy spells and abilities.

Divine Strikes.name: Divine Strikes
Divine Strikes.description: Damage dealt by Scourgebane now increases the damage of Argent Blade by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Duty Calls.name: Duty Calls
Duty Calls.description: Casting abilities that grant an Oath now increases your damage dealt and movement speed by 2% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Eternal Blessing.name: Eternal Blessing
Eternal Blessing.description:
Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 15% for 30 seconds.

While active, Oath Breakers deal an additional 141 + 12% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Eternally Devoted.name: Eternally Devoted
Eternally Devoted.description: Damage dealt through Eternal Blessing now reduces the cooldown of Libram spells by -4 sec.

Faith Guard.name: Faith Guard
Faith Guard.description: While under the effect of a Libram, your Chastise will now unleash an 8 yd line of holy power, dealing 112 + 25% AP Holy damage.

Fervent Castigation.name: Fervent Castigation
Fervent Castigation.description: Casting Righteous Upheaval or Blade of Faith now grants you Oath: Retribution and starts your Oath Chain.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.

Final Prayer.name: Final Prayer
Final Prayer.description: Doubles the healing done to you by Testament of Fortitude and Testament of Faith.

Finesse.name: Finesse
Finesse.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15%.

Focused.name: Focused
Focused.description: Increases the damage of Blade of Faith and Righteous Tempest by 25%.

Force of Golganneth.name: Force of Golganneth
Force of Golganneth.description:
Explode with holy power, dealing 310 + 25% AP + 25% holy SP Holy damage and triggering Zealotry every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 5 seconds.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

While active, your Temple Guardian spell has its Energy cost reduced by -50%.

Fortified Body.name: Fortified Body
Fortified Body.description:
Allies within 40 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

Additionally, increases your maximum health by 6%.

Fury of Aggramar.name: Fury of Aggramar
Fury of Aggramar.description: Increases the damage dealt by Libram of Consecration by 100% and the effectiveness of your Librams by 25%.

Gift of Fervor.name: Gift of Fervor
Gift of Fervor.description: Places an |cffffffffGift|r on the friendly target, increasing total stats by 10% for 30 min.

Gift of Zeal.name: Gift of Zeal
Gift of Zeal.description: Places a |cffffffffGift|r on a friendly target, increasing Agility by 3 for 30 min.

Grace of Aman'thul.name: Grace of Aman'thul
Grace of Aman'thul.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Righteous Lunge by -5 and Sacred Swing by -10.

Graceful Fighter.name: Graceful Fighter
Graceful Fighter.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your parry rating by 20% of Agility and your dodge rating by 20% of Intellect.

Greater Crusader's Oath.name: Greater Crusader's Oath
Greater Crusader's Oath.description: Places an |cFFFFFFFFOath|r on all raid and party members, increasing total stats by 10% for 30 min.

Greater Gift of Zeal.name: Greater Gift of Zeal
Greater Gift of Zeal.description: Places an |cFFFFFFFFOath|r on all raid and party members, increasing Agility by 77 for 30 min.

Guardian of the Light.name: Guardian of the Light
Guardian of the Light.description: Casting Benediction now reduces the cost of your next Temple Guardian by -50% for 6 seconds.

Harmonic Disposition.name: Harmonic Disposition
Harmonic Disposition.description: You radiate a harmonic disposition to nearby party and raid members, causing fall damage to be reduced and granting the ability to walk on water.

Heaven's Finest.name: Heaven's Finest
Heaven's Finest.description:
Damaging abilities now grant Heaven's Finest for 12 seconds, stacking 6 times.Heaven's FinestIncreases your movement speed by 5%.

At 6 stacks, increases your Energy regeneration by 100% for 8 seconds.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Holy Books.name: Holy Books
Holy Books.description:
Level 30 Passive
Using a Libram now removes 70% of the delayed damage from Oathkeeper.
Oathkeeper40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.

Holy Cleave.name: Holy Cleave
Holy Cleave.description:
Cleave through enemies, dealing 60% Weapon Damage plus 1 to your target and an additional nearby enemy and granting an |cffffffffOath|r.

|cffffffffOath:|r Your abilities strike 1 additional nearby target.

Holy Combatant.name: Holy Combatant
Holy Combatant.description: Your Argent Blade now also extends the duration of Interdict on your target by 1 sec.

Holy Constitution.name: Holy Constitution
Holy Constitution.description: Increases your damage dealt versus Undead by 5, scaling with level, and increases your chance to resist disease effects by 30%.

Holy Crusader.name: Holy Crusader
Holy Crusader.description: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Force by -30 sec.

Holy Edge.name: Holy Edge
Holy Edge.description: Damage dealt by Scourgebane and Scarlet Hammer now strikes 1 additional nearby enemy.

Holy Light.name: Holy Light
Holy Light.description: Your Benediction now has a 1.5 sec cast time, but now heals for 100% more.

Holy Tempest.name: Holy Tempest
Holy Tempest.description: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now spreads Condemn on affected enemies to a nearby enemy.

Holy Upheaval.name: Holy Upheaval
Holy Upheaval.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases the effectiveness Righteous Upheaval gains per trigger of Zealotry by 100%.

Holy Warstaff.name: Holy Warstaff
Holy Warstaff.description: Increases the damage of Reckoning by 20%.

Improved Benediction.name: Improved Benediction
Improved Benediction.description: Benediction now grants your target armor based on your Agility and Stamina for 15 sec.

Improved Scarlet Hammer.name: Improved Scarlet Hammer
Improved Scarlet Hammer.description:
Level 40 Passive
Casting Scarlet Hammer now generates 30 Energy.

Interdict.name: Interdict
Interdict.description: Forbid an enemy from sinning, silencing them for 6 seconds. If they are an Undead or Demon they are unable to be healed for the duration.

Iron Penance.name: Iron Penance
Iron Penance.description: Dealing damage with Zealotry now applies Iron Penance to the target, increasing their Physical damage taken by you by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Judgement.name: Judgement
Judgement.description: Increases the damage of Scourgebane, Scarlet Hammer, and Titanstrike by 25% on enemies below 20% health.

Judgement of the Gods.name: Judgement of the Gods
Judgement of the Gods.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Titanstrike by 50%.

Judicator.name: Judicator
Judicator.description: Increases your parry and dodge chance by 3%.

Justice.name: Justice
Justice.description: Your Interdict now strikes 1 additional nearby target.

Keeping the Oath.name: Keeping the Oath
Keeping the Oath.description:
Level 10 Passive
You now delay 40% of direct damage taken, instead taking it over 8 seconds.

In addition, you no longer consume your Oaths with Oath Breakers.

Legacy of the Silver Hand.name: Legacy of the Silver Hand
Legacy of the Silver Hand.description:
Casting Argent Blade or Scarlet Hammer now guarantees your next 2 instances of damage dealt by Scourgebane to critically strike.

Increases the critical damage of Scourgebane by 15%.

Liberty.name: Liberty
Liberty.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Libram spells by -30 sec.

Libram of Consecration.name: Libram of Consecration
Libram of Consecration.description:
Read from your |cffffffffLibram of Consecration|r, causing damaging abilities to deal an 20 additional Holy damage to your target for 20 sec.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffLibram|r spell can be active at a time.:ext@

Libram of Fervor.name: Libram of Fervor
Libram of Fervor.description: Read from your Libram of Fervor, granting you spell power equal to 30% of your Agility and attack power equal to 30% of your Intellect for 20 seconds.

Libram of Grace.name: Libram of Grace
Libram of Grace.description:
Read from your |cFFFFFFFFLibram of Grace|r, increasing your healing received by 20% and causing your damaging abilities to restore 31 health to you and nearby allies for 20 sec.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffLibram|r spell can be active at a time.:ext@

Libram of Tenacity.name: Libram of Tenacity
Libram of Tenacity.description: Read from your Libram of Tenacity, reducing your Physical Damage taken by -30% for 20 seconds.

Libram of Zeal.name: Libram of Zeal
Libram of Zeal.description: Read from your Libram of Mortal Abdication, increasing your melee haste by 20% and causes your damaging abilities to reduce the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -2 sec for 20 seconds.

Light's Chosen.name: Light's Chosen
Light's Chosen.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell power by 30% of your Agility and your critical strike rating by 15% of your Intellect.

Light's Echo.name: Light's Echo
Light's Echo.description: Argent Blade now has a 10% chance to strike an additional time.

Light's Guidance.name: Light's Guidance
Light's Guidance.description: Healing with Benediction now causes your next Benediction to heal for 25% more for 30 seconds.

Light's Hope.name: Light's Hope
Light's Hope.description: Make a plea to the light, restoring 100 Energy over 10 sec and reducing your threat each second.

Light's Ward.name: Light's Ward
Light's Ward.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases all magic resistances equal to 10% of your dodge rating and reduces your damage taken from periodic effects by -15%.

Lightkeeper.name: Lightkeeper
Lightkeeper.description:
Periodic damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to increase your parry chance by 2% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Periodic damage dealt by Condemn also has a 15% chance to burst, dealing 100 + 22% AP Holy damage to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of the target.

Lorescribe.name: Lorescribe
Lorescribe.description:
Level 40 Passive
Casting Oath Breaker abilities now reduce the cooldown of Librams by -4 sec.

Mark of Aggramar.name: Mark of Aggramar
Mark of Aggramar.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Testaments by -50%.

Martial Paladin.name: Martial Paladin
Martial Paladin.description: Increases your Agility by 5% and your chance to hit by 3%.

Martial Training.name: Martial Training
Martial Training.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your Chastise now deals an additional 50% Weapon Damage.

Martyr.name: Martyr
Martyr.description: Increases the effectiveness of Gift of Zeal by 20%.

Mending Ward.name: Mending Ward
Mending Ward.description:
Oath Breakers now grant you a stack of Mending Ward for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.Mending WardNext instance of direct damage taken while below 35% maximum health will consume these stacks to heal you for 395 + 25% Stamina. 

Healing scales with your Stamina and parry rating.

Might of Aggramar.name: Might of Aggramar
Might of Aggramar.description: Physical damage dealt now has a 25% chance to increase the tick rate and reduce cooldown of your next Blade of Faith by -10%, stacking 5 times.

Norgannon's Wrath.name: Norgannon's Wrath
Norgannon's Wrath.description:
Target an enemy and leap into the air. After a short delay, you blast them with immense holy force, dealing 1506 + 100% holy SP + 100% AP Holy damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds and reduces their damage and healing done by -10% for 5 seconds.

Damage dealt pierces all immunities, resistances, and damage absorption effects.

Scales with modifiers to Chastise.

Oath Flow.name: Oath Flow
Oath Flow.description: Increases the duration of Oath Chain by 2 sec.

One With The Light.name: One With The Light
One With The Light.description: Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams, Force of Golganneth, and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

One-Punch Man.name: One-Punch Man
One-Punch Man.description: Increases the the damage of Oath Breakers and Titanstrike by 20%.

Paladin Training.name: Paladin Training
Paladin Training.description: Increases the damage of Righteous Lunge and Argent Blade by 20%.

Paragon.name: Paragon
Paragon.description: Increases your Stamina by 10, plus an additional amount equal to 10% of your Agility.

Parry Dance.name: Parry Dance
Parry Dance.description: When you critically strike with auto attacks or parry an attack, your chance to parry is now increased by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Patience.name: Patience
Patience.description: Increases the duration of Interdict by 2 sec and its cooldown by -5 sec.

Pious Sweep.name: Pious Sweep
Pious Sweep.description: Increases the damage of Chastise by 25% on enemies above 75% health or affected by Tranquil Circle.

Priest Training.name: Priest Training
Priest Training.description: Triggering Zealotry now also heals you for 3% of your missing health.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Profound Enlightenment.name: Profound Enlightenment
Profound Enlightenment.description: Attain enlightenment, reducing the remaining cooldown of Testaments by 50%.

Pulverizing.name: Pulverizing
Pulverizing.description: Damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to consecrate the earth around you with holy fervor, dealing 91 + 22.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Pure Focus.name: Pure Focus
Pure Focus.description: Increases the chance to trigger Scourgebane by 5% and your chance to hit by 2%.

Radiance.name: Radiance
Radiance.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Vindication by -5.

Radiant Blade.name: Radiant Blade
Radiant Blade.description: Increases the effectiveness of Oath: Righteous Lunge by 25%.

Rebuke.name: Rebuke
Rebuke.description: Bask an ally in the light, dispelling 1 magic, poison, and disease effects from them.

Reckoning.name: Reckoning
Reckoning.description:
Unleash a powerful |cffffffffOath Breaker|r, dealing 52 Holy damage and restoring 15 Energy for each enemy struck.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Retribution.name: Retribution
Retribution.description: Melee damage dealt now has a 20% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt as Holy Damage.

Righteous Custodian.name: Righteous Custodian
Righteous Custodian.description: Place a blessing on a party or raid member, reducing their total threat by 2% every 1 sec. for 30 min.

Righteous Lunge.name: Righteous Lunge
Righteous Lunge.description:
Stab an enemy with holy fervor, dealing 90% Weapon Damage plus 16 and granting an |cffffffffOath|r.

|cffffffffOath:|r Your abilities damage or heal for 10% more.

Righteous Tempest.name: Righteous Tempest
Righteous Tempest.description:
Unleash a whirling |cffffffffOath Breaker|r, dealing Weapon Damage plus 25 damage to nearby enemies, scaling with spell power, every 1 sec for 3 sec.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Righteous Upheaval.name: Righteous Upheaval
Righteous Upheaval.description:
Unleash a dominating |cFFFFFFFFOath Breaker|r, dealing 48 Physical damage, increased by 3% for each time you triggered |cffffffffZealotry|r during your |cffffffffOath Chain|r.

Consumes your |cffffffffOaths|r, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Righteousness.name: Righteousness
Righteousness.description: Your Chastise now always triggers Scourgebane on your target.

Sacred Candle.name: Sacred Candle
Sacred Candle.description: Reduces the cooldown of Testament of Faith by -60 sec and the duration of Sacred Restraint by -30 sec.

Sacred Defense.name: Sacred Defense
Sacred Defense.description: When you take Physical damage you now strike back at enemies for 15% of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Can only occur once per sec.

Sacred Oath.name: Sacred Oath
Sacred Oath.description: Critical strikes now remove 1 sec from the duration of Oathkeeper when used.Oathkeeper40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.

Sacred Resistance.name: Sacred Resistance
Sacred Resistance.description: Casting Reckoning now increases your Armor by 15% for 15 seconds.

Sacred Style.name: Sacred Style
Sacred Style.description: Increases your Holy healing done and received by 8%.

Sacred Swing.name: Sacred Swing
Sacred Swing.description:
Swing at enemies in front of you, dealing 130% High Threat Weapon Damage plus 33, slowing their attack and movement speed by 20% for 10 sec.

Only usable after avoiding an attack.

Sanctify.name: Sanctify
Sanctify.description: Your Libram spells now grant you 10% increased melee haste for 20 seconds.

Scarlet Champion.name: Scarlet Champion
Scarlet Champion.description:
Your damaging critical strikes now increase your Holy damage dealt by 2% for 20 seconds. stacking 5 times. Can only occur once per sec.

At 5 stacks, you are granted High General.High GeneralYour next Chastise consumes all stacks of Scarlet Champion to deal 25% increased direct damage, and be guaranteed to critically strike.

Scarlet Judicator.name: Scarlet Judicator
Scarlet Judicator.description: Your Divine Force now strikes 2 additional enemies near the primary target.

Scarlet Secrets.name: Scarlet Secrets
Scarlet Secrets.description: Every 2nd cast of Argent Blade now grants you Oath: Retribution.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.

Scarlet Training.name: Scarlet Training
Scarlet Training.description:
Level 30 Passive
Casting Argent Blade while Warrior of Dawn is active now transforms your next Chastise into Scarlet Hammer.Scarlet HammerDrop a scarlet hammer on an enemy for 155% Weapon Damage plus 35 as Holy Damage and reduce their Armor by 555 for 10 seconds.

Scourge-Defense Training.name: Scourge-Defense Training
Scourge-Defense Training.description: Warrior of Dawn now also increases the damage and critical strike chance of your next Argent Blade by 20%.

Scourgebane.name: Scourgebane
Scourgebane.description:
Level 10 Passive
Direct damage dealt now has a 20% chance to strike an enemy with Scourgebane, dealing an additional 162 + 25% SP + 15% AP Holyflame Damage.

Serendipity.name: Serendipity
Serendipity.description:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by -5%.

Shackle The Unrepentant.name: Shackle The Unrepentant
Shackle The Unrepentant.description:
Shackle an Undead or Demon enemy, banishing them for 30 sec (6 sec versus players). The shackled unit is immune to Physical damage and is unable to move, attack or cast spells.

Only 1 target can be shackled at a time.

Silverhand Incantation.name: Silverhand Incantation
Silverhand Incantation.description:
Chant a silverhand incantation and toss a holy hammer at your target, charging you to them and removing Sacred Restraint from you and them if they are an ally.

Upon reaching your target you deal 300 + 200% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies and heal nearby allies for the same amount.

Solemn Soldier.name: Solemn Soldier
Solemn Soldier.description: Increases your melee haste by 5% and expertise by 5.

Spiritual Abdicator.name: Spiritual Abdicator
Spiritual Abdicator.description: Your Spiritual Abdication now reduces damage taken by an additional -5% per copy.

Spiritual Ascension.name: Spiritual Ascension
Spiritual Ascension.description:
Call an ally's spirit back to their body, bringing them back to life.

Usable while in combat.

Staffguard.name: Staffguard
Staffguard.description: Casting Sacred Swing now grants you Staffguard, absorbing 125 + 30% Stamina damage, scaling with Stamina, parry and dodge rating, for 8 seconds.

Sturdy.name: Sturdy
Sturdy.description: Increases your maximum health and Energy by 5%.

Teachings of the Cathedral.name: Teachings of the Cathedral
Teachings of the Cathedral.description: Your Oath: Condemn now provides 5% additional critical strike chance.

Templar Rituals.name: Templar Rituals
Templar Rituals.description: Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now deals an additional 35 + 10% holy SP + 8.5% AP Holy damage, and upon dealing damage, you pull enemies within 15 yds towards you.

Templar's Might.name: Templar's Might
Templar's Might.description: Your Righteous Lunge and Chastise used on enemies affected by your Condemn now deal 6% increased damage per stack.

Temple Guardian.name: Temple Guardian
Temple Guardian.description:
|cffffffff3 Charges, 35 sec recharge|r 
Charge towards an ally, healing you and them for 112.

Tenacious Defender.name: Tenacious Defender
Tenacious Defender.description: Casting Libram of Tenacity now also heals you for 20% of your maximum health.

Testament of Faith.name: Testament of Faith
Testament of Faith.description:
Say a prayer for an ally, healing them for 178.

Applies |cffffffffSacred Restraint|r for 1 min.@s:102208:0@

Testament of Fortitude.name: Testament of Fortitude
Testament of Fortitude.description:
Meditate for 15 seconds, restoring 5% of your maximum health every 1 sec and reducing damage taken by -50%.

Each second you will also remove 1 disease effect from yourself. 

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Testament of Hope.name: Testament of Hope
Testament of Hope.description:
Summons 2 copies of yourself that charge at a nearby enemy and aid you in combat for 20 seconds.

While within 15 yds of you, each copy reduces all damage you take by -10%. 

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Testament of Resolve.name: Testament of Resolve
Testament of Resolve.description:
Bless an ally with heightened resolve, granting immunity to fear, charm, and horrify effects for 10 sec.

Usable while feared.

Applies |cffffffffSacred Restraint|r for 1 min.@s:102208:0@

Testament of Strength.name: Testament of Strength
Testament of Strength.description:
Your next 3 Titanstrikes are usable regardless of your target's health percentage and deal 25% increased damage. Lasts 1 minute.

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Testament of Will.name: Testament of Will
Testament of Will.description:
Break an ally free of worldly constraints, making them immune to all movement impairing effects for 10 seconds.

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Titanfall.name: Titanfall
Titanfall.description: Your Titanstrike now heals you for twice the damage dealt.

Titanstrike.name: Titanstrike
Titanstrike.description:
Call down the wrath of the gods on an injured enemy, dealing 359 Holy Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt, and extending the duration of your |cFFFFFFFFOath Chain|r by 5 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

Tithe.name: Tithe
Tithe.description:
Pay a tithe of 1 silver to learn a special new ability to empower your entire party.

@ext:|cffffffffEastern Kingdoms:|r Northshire Abbey, Deathknell, Cathedral of Light, Scarlet Monastery, Strahnbrad, Light's Hope Chapel, The Sepulcher.|n|n|cffffffffKalimdor:|r The Temple of the Moon, Ethel Rethor, Valley of Spirits, The Pools of Vision.:ext@

Tranquil Circle.name: Tranquil Circle
Tranquil Circle.description:
Place a holy circle on the ground at the target location for 4 sec, slowing enemy movement speed by 50%.

Every 2 sec, enemies within the radius enter a tranquil state, falling asleep for 40 sec (8 sec vs players).

Transcendent Guardian.name: Transcendent Guardian
Transcendent Guardian.description: Charging to an ally with Temple Guardian now has a 40% chance to refresh a charge.

Transcending Strikes.name: Transcending Strikes
Transcending Strikes.description: Your Divine Force will now trigger a -30 sec reduced cooldown when used on enemies affected by Blade of Faith.

Tyr's Guard.name: Tyr's Guard
Tyr's Guard.description: Testament of Hope now summons an additional copy of yourself.

Unbroken Creed.name: Unbroken Creed
Unbroken Creed.description:
Level 50 Passive
Damaging abilities now grants you Unbroken Creed for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

When you use a damaging Oath Breaker or Divine Fury you now consume the stacks and auto attack your target an amount of times equal to your stack count.

Untainted.name: Untainted
Untainted.description:
Effectively healing yourself now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10 + 10% Stamina for 8 seconds.

Can only occur every 15 sec.

Upheave!.name: Upheave!
Upheave!.description: Increases the critical damage of Righteous Upheaval by 20%.

Uther's Legacy.name: Uther's Legacy
Uther's Legacy.description: Your Condemn now heals you for 75% of the damage dealt.

Vindication.name: Vindication

Warrior of Dawn.name: Warrior of Dawn
Warrior of Dawn.description: Melee damage dealt now has a 10% chance to reduce the Energy cost of your next Argent Blade by -50%.

Warrior of Tyr.name: Warrior of Tyr
Warrior of Tyr.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to generate 5 Energy.

Way of the Monk.name: Way of the Monk
Way of the Monk.description: Damage dealt by Sacred Swing and Reckoning now reduces casting speed by -10% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Whirling Tempest.name: Whirling Tempest
Whirling Tempest.description: While Righteous Tempest is active you gain 20% increased movement speed.

Zealotry.name: Zealotry
Zealotry.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your off-hand auto attacks now trigger Zealotry.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.
